---
name: 💡 Feature Proposal | System Expansion
about: Suggest a technical enhancement or a new architectural feature.
title: '[PROPOSAL] <Short Title>'
labels: 'enhancement, discussion'
assignees: ''

---


<br>

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Scope Check:** Ensure this proposal aligns with the core philosophy of PolyNode (Privacy, High-Performance, and Minimalist Engineering).


<br>

### 🚀 Logic & Problem Statement
Provide a clear and concise description of the functional gap or technical limitation. 
*Example: "The current rendering pipeline lacks support for..."*


<br>

### 🛠 Proposed Architectural Solution
A detailed technical description of the implementation you'd like to see. 
*Focus on the underlying logic: How should the system handle this new feature?*


<br>

### ⚖️ Technical Alternatives
A clear description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. Why is your proposed solution superior for this specific architecture?


<br>

### 🔗 Context & Implementation Details


<br>

> [!WARNING]
> Please include any relevant diagrams, API mockups, or specific dependencies that would be required to execute this expansion safely.

Add any other metadata, screenshots, or cross-platform considerations here.
